series_metadata.series_title: Internal Audit Workpapers and Audit Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Files include Internal Audit documentation of the various Lottery transaction cycles reviewed for a specific fiscal year. Each transaction cycle audited (reviewed) has a file- binder (digital) of working ‘papers’ to support the review

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: in applications database duration of audit; once all action items are completed or within five (5) years, move Final Audit/Engagement Reports (see separate retention schedule)
